message:
Optimize N+1 queries and intern doc_type strings

- Replace N+1 query pattern in get_tweet_thread with single recursive CTE
  (51 queries → 1 query for 50-tweet thread)
- Intern doc_type to &'static str in VectorSearchResult and VectorIndex,
  eliminating String allocations for the fixed set of types (tweet/like/dm/grok)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -226,7 +226,7 @@ fn expected_semantic_results(
 
     let lookups: Vec<_> = semantic_hits
         .iter()
-        .map(|hit| DocLookup::with_type(&hit.doc_id, &hit.doc_type))
+        .map(|hit| DocLookup::with_type(&hit.doc_id, hit.doc_type))
         .collect();
     let fetched = search_engine
         .get_by_ids(&lookups)
